rfps.title: NASA FINESST Fellowship — Earth & Space Science (via VT)
rfps.description: NASA FINESST pays ~50k/yr stipend. Glenn's NASA MTRI + LiDAR/NDVI background makes him competitive. Pursue through Virginia Tech as host institution.

rfps.title: VT Transportation Research Council — Drone & GIS Contracts
rfps.description: VTRC regularly issues contracts for drone survey, GIS, remote sensing, and geospatial data management. 40 min from Salem VA — perfect for Niche Management LLC.

rfps.title: VT Office of Research — Geospatial & Remote Sensing Subcontracts
rfps.description: VT Research Office issues subcontracts for geospatial AI, remote sensing, environmental monitoring, and UAV research. Co-investigator and consultant roles for industry partners.

rfps.title: VT Institute for Policy & Governance — Geospatial Research Contracts
rfps.description: VTIPG issues research contracts in environmental monitoring, land use, geospatial policy, and remote sensing applications.

jobs.title: Check for openings: NASA FINESST Fellowship
jobs.description: ~$50k/yr research fellowship. Glenn's NASA MTRI background is competitive.

jobs.title: Check for openings: Stanford University — Earth System Science / Remote Sensing
jobs.org: Stanford University — Earth System Science / Remote Sensing
jobs.description: Stanford ESS and the Hansen Lab. Remote sensing, satellite data, GeoAI, and climate systems research. Also check Stanford HAI for GeoAI positions.

jobs.title: Check for openings: MIT — Earth, Atmospheric & Planetary Sciences / CSAIL
jobs.org: MIT — Earth, Atmospheric & Planetary Sciences / CSAIL
jobs.description: MIT EAPS and Computer Science AI Lab. Remote sensing algorithms, satellite data science, GeoAI. Also check MIT Lincoln Laboratory for defense remote sensing.

jobs.title: Check for openings: Virginia Tech — Graduate Admissions (PhD)
jobs.description: Funded PhD RA in geospatial, remote sensing, environmental analysis. 40 min away!

jobs.title: Check for openings: University of Michigan — Remote Sensing & GIS Research
jobs.org: University of Michigan — Remote Sensing & GIS Research
jobs.description: Glenn's alma mater. Check SNRE, Geography, EECS, and CLASP departments. Also: MTRI (Michigan Tech Research Institute) where Glenn worked NASA projects.

jobs.title: Check for openings: UC Berkeley — ESPM / Geography / Berkeley Seismological Lab
jobs.org: UC Berkeley — ESPM / Geography / Berkeley Seismological Lab
jobs.description: Strong remote sensing, environmental modeling, and geospatial AI programs. Also check Berkeley AI Research (BAIR) for GeoAI research scientist roles.

jobs.title: Check for openings: University of Colorado Boulder — CIRES / LASP
jobs.org: University of Colorado Boulder — CIRES / LASP
jobs.description: CIRES (Cooperative Institute for Research in Environmental Sciences) and LASP (Laboratory for Atmospheric & Space Physics). Excellent satellite remote sensing research groups.

jobs.title: Check for openings: Penn State — Geography / Earth & Environmental Systems
jobs.org: Penn State — Geography / Earth & Environmental Systems
jobs.description: Top-ranked geography and remote sensing program. Strong NASA and NOAA partnerships. Check GeoVISTA Center and Earth & Environmental Systems Institute (EESI).

jobs.title: Check for openings: USC — Spatial Sciences Institute / Viterbi School
jobs.org: USC — Spatial Sciences Institute / Viterbi School
jobs.description: USC Spatial Sciences Institute (SSI) — one of the top GIS and spatial data science programs in the US. Research scientist and faculty positions in geospatial AI and remote sensing.

jobs.title: Check for openings: University of Maryland — ESSIC / GEOG Dept
jobs.org: University of Maryland — ESSIC / GEOG Dept
jobs.description: Earth System Science Interdisciplinary Center (ESSIC) has strong NASA/NOAA partnerships. UMD Geography maintains an excellent job board: geog.umd.edu/resources/job-opportunities

jobs.title: Check for openings: SETI Institute
jobs.description: Research scientist, data analyst, and astronomer roles.

jobs.title: Check for openings: Virginia Tech — Faculty & Research Positions
jobs.description: Adjunct lecturer (GIS/Remote Sensing), research scientist, PhD RA positions.

jobs.title: Check for openings: U of Michigan — SNRE / SEAS Research Positions
jobs.org: U of Michigan — SNRE / SEAS Research Positions

jobs.title: Check for openings: Colorado State University — CIRA / Atmospheric Science
jobs.org: Colorado State University — CIRA / Atmospheric Science
jobs.description: CIRA (Cooperative Institute for Research in the Atmosphere) — strong NOAA-partnered satellite and remote sensing research. Environmental intelligence and hazard monitoring.

jobs.title: Check for openings: George Mason University — Geography & GeoInfo Science
jobs.org: George Mason University — Geography & GeoInfo Science
jobs.description: Center for Spatial Information Science and Systems. Near DC with strong NGA and DoD connections. Remote sensing, GeoAI, and geospatial intelligence focus.

jobs.title: Check for openings: University of Arizona — Lunar & Planetary Lab / Steward Observatory
jobs.org: University of Arizona — Lunar & Planetary Lab / Steward Observatory
jobs.description: LPL and Steward Observatory post research scientist and postdoc roles in planetary remote sensing, UAP-adjacent anomaly detection, and astronomical instrumentation.

jobs.title: Check for openings: University of Wisconsin-Madison — SSEC / Nelson Institute
jobs.org: University of Wisconsin-Madison — SSEC / Nelson Institute
jobs.description: Space Science & Engineering Center (SSEC) — strong satellite remote sensing and atmospheric science. CIMSS (Cooperative Institute for Meteorological Satellite Studies) NOAA partner.

jobs.title: Check for openings: Maxar Technologies
jobs.description: Object detection, GeoAI, satellite imagery analyst roles.

jobs.title: Check for openings: Ohio State University — Byrd Polar & Climate Research / Geography
jobs.org: Ohio State University — Byrd Polar & Climate Research / Geography
jobs.description: Strong LiDAR, satellite remote sensing, and polar science programs. Byrd Polar Center does important glacier and climate remote sensing research.

jobs.org: Texas A&M — TAMU Geography / Remote Sensing Center
jobs.description: One of the top US remote sensing research programs. Strong agricultural, environmental, and hazard remote sensing focus. NOAA and USDA partnerships.

jobs.description: Best single job board for university GIS/remote sensing research positions. Updated frequently. Always check this weekly.

jobs.description: Best board for earth science, remote sensing, and space research positions. Covers postdocs, research scientists, and faculty at universities and labs.
